description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named push that triggers on push to the master branch. The workflow should have write permissions to repository contents and perform the following steps: checkout the source code, install Doxygen dependencies, clone the IBAMR-docs repository, grab a tagfile, generate Doxygen documentation, archive the Doxygen log, update the IBAMR-docs repository, and push the changes to the IBAMR-docs repository using a deploy key.
